name: Vulcan
description: MITRE Security Requirements Guide authoring tool

SECRET_KEY_BASE.description: A secret key for verifying the integrity of signed cookies.

WEB_CONCURRENCY.description: Number of Puma worker processes. Set to 2 for basic dynos, can increase for larger dynos.

RAILS_MAX_THREADS.description: Maximum number of threads per Puma worker. Default Rails setting.

JEMALLOC_ENABLED.description: Enable jemalloc for better memory management (20-40% reduction).

VULCAN_CONSENT_CONTENT.value: This is a preview instance of Vulcan for review purposes. By continuing, you acknowledge that this environment may be reset at any time and should not be used for production work. All activity may be monitored.

scripts.postdeploy: DISABLE_DATABASE_ENVIRONMENT_CHECK=1 bundle exec rails db:schema:load db:seed admin:bootstrap
